summary: Completed comprehensive testing of THE BRIDGE travel website. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend fully functional with all sections loading correctly, navigation working, API integration successful, and contact form submission working with email notifications.
passed_tests: All 10 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Hero section loads with video background and functional CTA buttons
Navigation links scroll to correct sections smoothly
Experiences section displays 4 experience cards from API correctly
Upcoming Trips section displays 4 trip listings from API
Testimonials section displays 4 testimonial cards from API
Contact form submission works - POST /api/contact successful
Form validation working for required fields
Trip interest dropdown in contact form working
Footer and social links present and functional
